
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" />
  <title>Save The Date</title>
  <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/phaser@3/dist/phaser.min.js"></script>
  <style>
    
    @font-face {
      font-family: 'Press Start 2P';
      font-style: normal;
      font-weight: 400;
      src: url(data:font/truetype;base64,) format('truetype');
    }

    html, body {
      margin: 0;
      padding: 0;
      background: #111827;
      font-family: monospace;
      height: 100%;
      overflow: hidden;
      touch-action: none;
    }

    body {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
    }

    #game-container {
      border-radius: 12px;
      overflow: hidden;
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <div id="game-container"></div>

  <script>
    const IMAGE_DATA = {
      'player-custom': 'data:image/png;base64,',
      'girl-1': 'data:image/png;base64,',
      'girl-2': 'data:image/png;base64,',
      'girl-3': 'data:image/png;base64,',
      'girl-4': 'data:image/png;base64,',
      'girl-5': 'data:image/png;base64,',
      'girl-6': 'data:image/png;base64,',
      'girl-7': 'data:image/png;base64,',
      'girl-8': 'data:image/png;base64,',
      'girl-9': 'data:image/png;base64,',
      'heart': 'data:image/png;base64,',
      'sound-icon': 'data:image/png;base64,',
    };

    /* Pick portrait or landscape based on screen shape */
    const isPortrait = window.innerHeight > window.innerWidth;
    const W = isPortrait ? 400 : 800;
    const H = 600;
    let _soundOn = true; /* persists across scene restarts */

    class DodgerScene extends Phaser.Scene {
      constructor() {
        super('DodgerScene');
      }

      preload() {
        this.load.image('player-custom', IMAGE_DATA['player-custom']);
        this.load.image('heart-icon', IMAGE_DATA['heart']);
        this.load.image('sound-icon', IMAGE_DATA['sound-icon']);

        this.girlImageKeys = [];
        for (let i = 1; i <= 9; i += 1) {
          const key = `girl-${i}`;
          this.girlImageKeys.push(key);
          this.load.image(key, IMAGE_DATA[key]);
        }
      }

      create() {
        this.gameStarted = false;
        this.gameOver = false;
        this.score = 0;
        this.lives = 3;
        this.fallSpeed = 180;
        /* On portrait the field is half as wide, so slow the player down */
        this.playerSpeedBonus = isPortrait ? 0 : 40;
        this.playerSpeed = this.fallSpeed + this.playerSpeedBonus;
        this.target = null;
        this.startOverlay = [];
        this.endOverlay = [];

        this.availableGirlKeys = this.girlImageKeys.filter((key) => this.textures.exists(key));

        this.drawDesertBackground();
        this.createFallbackTextures();

        this.titleMain = this.add.text(20, 30, 'Help Yotam save the date', {
          fontSize: isPortrait ? '10px' : '18px',
          color: '#1f2937',
          fontStyle: 'bold',
          fontFamily: "'Press Start 2P', monospace"
        });

        this.titleSub = this.add.text(this.titleMain.x + this.titleMain.width + 6, isPortrait ? 32 : 34, '(להציל את התמר)', {
          fontSize: isPortrait ? '20px' : '20px',
          color: '#1f2937',
          fontStyle: 'bold',
          fontFamily: "'Press Start 2P', monospace"
        });

        this.livesLabel = this.add.text(20, isPortrait ? 60 : 80, 'Lives:', {
          fontSize: isPortrait ? '12px' : '18px',
          color: '#1f2937',
          fontStyle: 'bold',
          fontFamily: "'Press Start 2P', monospace"
        });

        this.hearts = [];
        const heartSize = isPortrait ? 20 : 26;
        const heartGap = isPortrait ? 24 : 32;
        for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
          const heart = this.add.image(this.livesLabel.x + this.livesLabel.width + 14 + i * heartGap, this.livesLabel.y + (isPortrait ? 5 : 8), 'heart-icon');
          heart.setDisplaySize(heartSize, heartSize);
          this.hearts.push(heart);
        }

        this.scoreText = this.add.text(W - (isPortrait ? 150 : 200), isPortrait ? 60 : 80, 'Caught: 0', {
          fontSize: isPortrait ? '12px' : '18px',
          color: '#1f2937',
          fontStyle: 'bold',
          fontFamily: "'Press Start 2P', monospace"
        });

        /* Sound toggle button */
        this.soundOn = _soundOn;
        this.createSoundToggle();

        const playerTexture = this.textures.exists('player-custom') ? 'player-custom' : 'player-fallback';
        this.player = this.physics.add.sprite(W / 2, H - 80, playerTexture);
        this.player.setCollideWorldBounds(false);
        this.player.body.setAllowGravity(false);
        this.player.setVelocity(0, 0);
        this.player.setDisplaySize(isPortrait ? 70 : 78, isPortrait ? 98 : 110);

        this.cursors = this.input.keyboard.createCursorKeys();
        this.spaceKey = this.input.keyboard.addKey(Phaser.Input.Keyboard.KeyCodes.SPACE);

        /* Unlock audio on first user tap (mobile browsers require this) */
        this.input.on('pointerdown', () => {
          const ctx = this.sound.context;
          if (ctx && ctx.state === 'suspended') ctx.resume();
        }, this);

        /* Touch controls: hold left/right side of screen to move */
        this.touchDir = 0;
        this.input.on('pointerdown', (pointer) => {
          if (this.gameOver) {
            this.scene.restart();
            return;
          }
          if (!this.gameStarted) {
            this.startGame();
            return;
          }
          this.touchDir = pointer.x < W / 2 ? -1 : 1;
        });
        this.input.on('pointermove', (pointer) => {
          if (!pointer.isDown || !this.gameStarted || this.gameOver) return;
          this.touchDir = pointer.x < W / 2 ? -1 : 1;
        });
        this.input.on('pointerup', () => {
          this.touchDir = 0;
        });

        this.showStartScreen();
      }

      createFallbackTextures() {
        if (!this.textures.exists('player-fallback')) {
          const graphics = this.make.graphics({ x: 0, y: 0, add: false });
          graphics.fillStyle(0x2563eb, 1);
          graphics.fillCircle(20, 20, 20);
          graphics.generateTexture('player-fallback', 40, 40);
          graphics.clear();
          graphics.fillStyle(0xdb2777, 1);
          graphics.fillCircle(16, 16, 16);
          graphics.generateTexture('target-fallback', 32, 32);
          graphics.destroy();
        }
      }

      createSoundToggle() {
        const iconSize = isPortrait ? 24 : 30;
        const bx = W - iconSize / 2 - (isPortrait ? 14 : 18);
        const by = (isPortrait ? 16 : 20) + iconSize / 2;

        this.soundIcon = this.add.image(bx, by, 'sound-icon')
          .setDisplaySize(iconSize, iconSize).setDepth(100);

        /* Red X overlay for muted state */
        this.muteX = this.add.graphics().setDepth(101);
        this.drawMuteX(bx, by, iconSize);

        this.soundIcon.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
        this.soundIcon.on('pointerdown', (pointer, lx, ly, event) => {
          event.stopPropagation();
          this.soundOn = !this.soundOn;
          _soundOn = this.soundOn;
          this.drawMuteX(bx, by, iconSize);
        });
      }

      drawMuteX(cx, cy, size) {
        this.muteX.clear();
        if (!this.soundOn) {
          const r = size * 0.45;
          this.muteX.lineStyle(4, 0xcc0000, 1);
          this.muteX.beginPath();
          this.muteX.moveTo(cx - r, cy - r);
          this.muteX.lineTo(cx + r, cy + r);
          this.muteX.strokePath();
          this.muteX.beginPath();
          this.muteX.moveTo(cx + r, cy - r);
          this.muteX.lineTo(cx - r, cy + r);
          this.muteX.strokePath();
          this.muteX.setVisible(true);
        } else {
          this.muteX.setVisible(false);
        }
      }

      getAudioContext() {
        const ctx = this.sound.context;
        if (!ctx) return null;
        /* Mobile browsers suspend AudioContext until a user gesture resumes it */
        if (ctx.state === 'suspended') ctx.resume();
        return ctx;
      }

      playCatchSound() {
        if (!this.soundOn) return;
        const ctx = this.getAudioContext();
        if (!ctx) return;
        const oscillator = ctx.createOscillator();
        const gain = ctx.createGain();
        oscillator.type = 'triangle';
        oscillator.frequency.setValueAtTime(650, ctx.currentTime);
        gain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.05, ctx.currentTime);
        gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001, ctx.currentTime + 0.16);
        oscillator.connect(gain);
        gain.connect(ctx.destination);
        oscillator.start(ctx.currentTime);
        oscillator.stop(ctx.currentTime + 0.16);
      }

      playMissSound() {
        if (!this.soundOn) return;
        const ctx = this.getAudioContext();
        if (!ctx) return;
        const oscillator = ctx.createOscillator();
        const gain = ctx.createGain();
        oscillator.type = 'sawtooth';
        oscillator.frequency.setValueAtTime(220, ctx.currentTime);
        oscillator.frequency.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(140, ctx.currentTime + 0.22);
        gain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.05, ctx.currentTime);
        gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001, ctx.currentTime + 0.22);
        oscillator.connect(gain);
        gain.connect(ctx.destination);
        oscillator.start(ctx.currentTime);
        oscillator.stop(ctx.currentTime + 0.22);
      }

      drawDesertBackground() {
        this.add.rectangle(W / 2, H / 2, W, H, 0xf3c97a).setDepth(-20);
        this.add.circle(W * 0.85, H * 0.06, 40, 0xffdd66).setDepth(-19);
        this.add.ellipse(W * 0.275, H * 0.85, W * 0.65, 150, 0xe7b85f).setDepth(-18);
        this.add.ellipse(W * 0.7, H * 0.89, W * 0.775, 170, 0xdca24d).setDepth(-17);
        this.add.ellipse(W * 0.45, H * 0.98, W * 1.125, 220, 0xc68642).setDepth(-16);

        const cs = isPortrait ? 0.6 : 1; /* scale cactus sizes for portrait */
        const cactus1 = this.add.graphics();
        cactus1.fillStyle(0x2f7d32, 1);
        cactus1.fillRoundedRect(W * 0.1125, H * 0.76, 18 * cs, 90 * cs, 6 * cs);
        cactus1.fillRoundedRect(W * 0.1125 - 14 * cs, H * 0.76 + 25 * cs, 14 * cs, 34 * cs, 6 * cs);
        cactus1.fillRoundedRect(W * 0.1125 + 18 * cs, H * 0.76 + 35 * cs, 14 * cs, 30 * cs, 6 * cs);
        cactus1.setDepth(-15);

        const cactus2 = this.add.graphics();
        cactus2.fillStyle(0x2f7d32, 1);
        cactus2.fillRoundedRect(W * 0.9, H * 0.78, 18 * cs, 82 * cs, 6 * cs);
        cactus2.fillRoundedRect(W * 0.9 - 14 * cs, H * 0.78 + 20 * cs, 14 * cs, 28 * cs, 6 * cs);
        cactus2.setDepth(-15);
      }

      drawPanel(x, y, w, h) {
        const panel = this.add.rectangle(x, y, w, h, 0x020617, 0.95);
        panel.setStrokeStyle(6, 0xe5e7eb);
        return panel;
      }

      showStartScreen() {
        const cx = W / 2;
        const cy = H / 2;
        const pw = Math.min(W - 40, 560);
        const panel = this.drawPanel(cx, cy, pw, 320);

        const title = this.add.text(cx, cy - 90, 'SAVE THE DATE!', {
          fontSize: isPortrait ? '24px' : '30px',
          color: '#ffffff',
          fontStyle: 'bold',
          fontFamily: "'Press Start 2P', monospace"
        }).setOrigin(0.5);

        const subtitleMain = this.add.text(cx, cy - 30, 'Help Yotam save Tamar', {
          fontSize: isPortrait ? '12px' : '16px',
          color: '#ffffff',
          fontStyle: 'bold',
          fontFamily: "'Press Start 2P', monospace"
        }).setOrigin(0.5);

        const subtitleSub = this.add.text(cx, cy - 4, '(=the date)', {
          fontSize: isPortrait ? '8px' : '10px',
          color: '#d1d5db',
          fontStyle: 'bold',
          fontFamily: "'Press Start 2P', monospace"
        }).setOrigin(0.5);

        const subtitleHint = this.add.text(cx, cy + 35, isPortrait ? 'Tap left or right.\nCatch Tamar.' : 'Move left and right. Catch Tamar.', {
          fontSize: isPortrait ? '10px' : '12px',
          color: '#d1d5db',
          align: 'center',
          lineSpacing: 8,
          wordWrap: { width: pw - 60 },
          fontFamily: "'Press Start 2P', monospace"
        }).setOrigin(0.5);

        const button = this.add.text(cx, cy + 95, 'PLAY', {
          fontSize: '28px',
          color: '#00ffcc',
          fontStyle: 'bold',
          fontFamily: "'Press Start 2P', monospace"
        }).setOrigin(0.5).setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });

        button.on('pointerdown', () => this.startGame());
        this.startOverlay = [panel, title, subtitleMain, subtitleSub, subtitleHint, button];
      }

      clearOverlay(items) {
        items.forEach((item) => {
          if (item && item.destroy) item.destroy();
        });
      }

      startGame() {
        if (this.gameStarted) return;
        this.gameStarted = true;
        this.clearOverlay(this.startOverlay);
        this.startOverlay = [];
        if (isPortrait) this.showTouchHint();
        this.spawnTarget();
      }

      showTouchHint() {
        this.touchHintItems = [];
        const topY = 110;
        const botY = H - 130;
        const midY = topY + (botY - topY) / 2;
        const alpha = 0.18;
        const dep = -5;

        /* Vertical divider line */
        const line = this.add.rectangle(W / 2, midY, 2, botY - topY, 0x000000, alpha).setDepth(dep);
        this.touchHintItems.push(line);

        const arrowStyle = {
          fontSize: '52px',
          color: '#000000',
          fontFamily: "'Press Start 2P', monospace"
        };
        const labelStyle = {
          fontSize: '12px',
          color: '#000000',
          align: 'center',
          lineSpacing: 4,
          fontFamily: "'Press Start 2P', monospace"
        };

        /* Left side */
        const leftArrow = this.add.text(W * 0.25, midY - 35, '<', arrowStyle)
          .setOrigin(0.5).setAlpha(alpha).setDepth(dep);
        const leftLabel = this.add.text(W * 0.25, midY + 30, 'Touch to\nmove left', labelStyle)
          .setOrigin(0.5).setAlpha(alpha).setDepth(dep);
        this.touchHintItems.push(leftArrow, leftLabel);

        /* Right side */
        const rightArrow = this.add.text(W * 0.75, midY - 35, '>', arrowStyle)
          .setOrigin(0.5).setAlpha(alpha).setDepth(dep);
        const rightLabel = this.add.text(W * 0.75, midY + 30, 'Touch to\nmove right', labelStyle)
          .setOrigin(0.5).setAlpha(alpha).setDepth(dep);
        this.touchHintItems.push(rightArrow, rightLabel);
      }

      removeTouchHint() {
        if (this.touchHintItems) {
          this.touchHintItems.forEach(item => item.destroy());
          this.touchHintItems = null;
        }
      }

      getRandomGirlTexture() {
        if (this.availableGirlKeys.length > 0) {
          return Phaser.Utils.Array.GetRandom(this.availableGirlKeys);
        }
        return 'target-fallback';
      }

      spawnTarget() {
        if (this.gameOver) return;

        if (this.target) {
          this.target.destroy();
        }

        const texture = this.getRandomGirlTexture();
        const x = Phaser.Math.Between(30, W - 30);
        this.target = this.physics.add.sprite(x, -30, texture);
        this.target.body.setAllowGravity(false);
        this.target.setVelocity(0, this.fallSpeed);
        this.target.setDisplaySize(isPortrait ? 58 : 68, isPortrait ? 82 : 96);

        this.physics.add.overlap(this.player, this.target, () => this.catchTarget());
      }

      catchTarget() {
        if (!this.target || this.gameOver) return;

        this.playCatchSound();
        this.target.destroy();
        this.target = null;
        this.score += 1;
        this.scoreText.setText(`Caught: ${this.score}`);
        if (this.score >= 3 && this.touchHintItems) this.removeTouchHint();
        this.fallSpeed += 14;
        this.playerSpeed = this.fallSpeed + this.playerSpeedBonus;
        this.spawnTarget();
      }

      missTarget() {
        if (!this.target || this.gameOver) return;

        this.playMissSound();
        this.target.destroy();
        this.target = null;
        this.lives -= 1;

        const safeLives = Math.max(this.lives, 0);
        this.hearts.forEach((h, i) => h.setVisible(i < safeLives));

        if (this.lives <= 0) {
          this.endGame();
          return;
        }

        this.spawnTarget();
      }

      endGame() {
        if (this.gameOver) return;
        this.gameOver = true;

        const cx = W / 2;
        const cy = H / 2;
        const pw = Math.min(W - 40, 520);
        const panel = this.drawPanel(cx, cy, pw, 285);

        const endLine1 = this.add.text(cx, cy - 95, 'You saved the date ' + this.score + ' times!', {
          fontSize: isPortrait ? '10px' : '15px',
          color: '#ffffff',
          align: 'center',
          lineSpacing: 6,
          fontStyle: 'bold',
          wordWrap: { width: pw - 60 },
          fontFamily: "'Press Start 2P', monospace"
        }).setOrigin(0.5);

        const endLine2 = this.add.text(cx, endLine1.y + endLine1.height + 16, 'Now save it once more:', {
          fontSize: isPortrait ? '13px' : '19px',
          color: '#ffffff',
          align: 'center',
          fontStyle: 'bold',
          fontFamily: "'Press Start 2P', monospace"
        }).setOrigin(0.5);

        const dateText = this.add.text(cx, cy + 20, '26.6.26', {
          fontSize: isPortrait ? '40px' : '48px',
          color: '#00ffcc',
          fontStyle: 'bold',
          fontFamily: "'Press Start 2P', monospace"
        }).setOrigin(0.5);

        const restartText = this.add.text(cx, cy + 105, 'Tap or press Space to restart', {
          fontSize: isPortrait ? '8px' : '14px',
          color: '#ffffff',
          fontFamily: "'Press Start 2P', monospace"
        }).setOrigin(0.5);

        this.endOverlay = [panel, endLine1, endLine2, dateText, restartText];
      }

      update() {
        if (Phaser.Input.Keyboard.JustDown(this.spaceKey)) {
          if (this.gameOver) {
            this.scene.restart();
            return;
          }
          if (!this.gameStarted) {
            this.startGame();
            return;
          }
        }
        if (!this.gameStarted || this.gameOver || !this.target) return;

        let vx = 0;
        if (this.cursors.left.isDown) vx = -1;
        else if (this.cursors.right.isDown) vx = 1;

        /* Touch overrides keyboard when active */
        if (this.touchDir !== 0) vx = this.touchDir;

        this.player.setVelocity(vx * this.playerSpeed, 0);

        if (this.player.x < -26) {
          this.player.x = W + 26;
        } else if (this.player.x > W + 26) {
          this.player.x = -26;
        }

        if (this.target.y > H + 20) {
          this.missTarget();
        }
      }
    }

    function runSmokeTests() {
      console.assert(typeof DodgerScene === 'function', 'DodgerScene should be defined');
    }

    runSmokeTests();

    /* Wait for the font to be fully loaded before starting the game */
    document.fonts.ready.then(() => {
      return document.fonts.load("16px 'Press Start 2P'");
    }).then(() => {
      new Phaser.Game({
        type: Phaser.AUTO,
        width: W,
        height: H,
        parent: 'game-container',
        scale: {
          mode: Phaser.Scale.FIT,
          autoCenter: Phaser.Scale.CENTER_BOTH,
        },
        physics: {
          default: 'arcade',
          arcade: {
            debug: false
          }
        },
        scene: DodgerScene
      });
    });
  </script>
</body>
</html>
